panel.summary: F1(critical) stale-cache auto-reseed data-loss if classifier trusts stamp not content-hash [REFUTED-by-code]; F2 required id_prefix breaks existing extends packs [false-alarm: extends is new]; F3 match_pins **/# heuristic shipped unfixed [deferred: fixed oracle]; F4 relocation reading-order; F5 baseline masking; F6 'byte' vs canonicalized wording; F7 ledger CI gate.

id_prefix/stale-exclude may break existing project packs [false-alarm: extends is new]; stale-cache forged-stamp bypass unless content hashes to ledgered base [REFUTED: decision uses local_hash-in-ledger, self-tested]; ledger+classifier must share canonicalization (they do); guard fail-open is deterrent-only [by design]. Version bump + ledger duty block 2.25.0 release, not the merge.

id_prefix requirement leaks a breaking change [false-alarm: extends new]; harden match_pins now [deferred: fixed oracle]; inspect gringotts delta before folding [done: benign additive]; guard fail-open interactive-only [by design]. Credits the delivery's forthrightness; no outright correctness/safety blocker.

fail-open guard vs deny objective [by design deterrent]; LLM primacy — doctrine below rule [known tradeoff, warn-only]; deferred fragile oracle guarantees future halts [deferred: fixed oracle]; baseline churn masks over-sensitivity [delta inspected benign]; prefix-scan coupling without manifest [intended single-source design].
